exploration_notes: Implementation follows GCC's GIMPLE pass patterns from tree-ssa-dce.cc and tree-ssa-ccp.cc. The pass_data struct uses GIMPLE_PASS type with PROP_cfg required. The class inherits from gimple_opt_pass with gate() returning true (always run) and execute() using FOR_EACH_BB_FN to count basic blocks, reporting via dump_file/fprintf following existing dump patterns. Factory function make_pass_count_bbs() follows the make_pass_* convention from tree-pass.h.
